title: Tragacantha farcta
taxonomy: Tragacantha farcta is a species of plant in the family Fabaceae. It is commonly known as buckthorn or fern-leaf broom. The classification of Tragacantha farcta is as follows: genus - Tragacantha, species - farcta, family - Fabaceae. The plant is native to various regions, including Europe and Asia. Tragacantha farcta is also known to have medicinal properties, although more research is required to fully understand its uses.

intro: Tragacantha farcta, also known as buckthorn or spiny buckthorn, is a spiny shrub or small tree native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia.
